titleStmt.title: SII 39.262: original edition by K. Karuppiah

No. 262. (A.R. No. 262 of 1916.) SRIMUSHNAM, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT. BHŪVARAGAHAVA-PERUMĀḶ TEMPLE-ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE SAME PRĀKĀRA VIJAYANAGARA: VI7RAPRATAPA SRIRANGADĒVA MAHARAYA-ŚAKA 1508 (1586 A.D.)

summary.p: This inscription registers the gift of the village Arantāṅgi, otherwise known as Ādivarāhakoṇḍasamudram in Chōḻa-Uttamapurappaṟṟu of Vaḻudalambaṭṭusāvaḍi in Veṇṇaiyūr nāḍu, a sub-division of Vaḍagarai Rājādhirāja vaḷanāḍu in Chōḻamaṇḍalam, for special worship and the maintenance to the temple of Ādivarāhaperumāḷ temple by Kāḷañji Mallappa Nāyaka son of Mārappa Nāyaka, for the merit of Vaiyappa Kṛishṇappa koṇḍama Nāyaka.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
subhamastu svastiśrī manmahāmaṇḍaleśvaran rājādhirāja rājaparameśvaran pūrvadakṣiṇa paśvimottara catusamudradhipati
śrī virapratāpan raṅgatevamahārāyar pradhivirājyam paṇṇiyaruḷā niṉṟa śakābdam 1000 5 100 8ṉmel cellā ni
ṉṟa vyayasamvaṣasarattut tullānāyaṟṟu pūrvapakṣattu dvādaśiyum revati nakṣataramum peṟṟa
somavārattu nāḷ coḻamaṇṭalam vaṭakarai rājādhirāja vaḷanāṭṭu veṇṇaiyūr nā
ṭṭu vaḻutalampaṭṭuc cāvaṭi Aṉucāramāṉa coḻauttamapurapaṟṟil kāṭārampamāṉa naṟṟam Aṟantāṅkikku
piṟutināmamāṉa Ātivarāka koṇṭa camuttiram vaiyyappakkiṣṭiṇappak koṇṭama nāyakkarayyaṉu
kku puṇṇiyamāka mārappa nāyakkar kumārar kāḷañci mallappa nāyakkar tirumuṭṭam cuvāmi Ātivarākap perumāḷu
kku viceṣa tiruvārātaṉattukkum tiruppaṇikkumāka Utakatārā pūṟuvamāka kaṭṭaḷai Iṭṭu cilācāṉam paṇṇi
kuṭuttapapaṭiṉāle Anta kiṟāmattil nāṉkellai Uḷpaṭṭa cakala camutāyap piṟāttiyam cuvāti Ātivarākamūrtti śrīpaṇṭāra
ttile Aṉupavittuk koḷḷak kaṭavārakavum Itukku viceḻakaṭṭaḷai tirumañca kaṭṭaḷaikku teṅkāy Oṉṟu paḻam pattu
teṉṟu cakkarai pala Oṉṟu veḷḷāṟṟu tirumañcaṉa Orukuṭam tirumālai Eṭṭu Amutupaṭi tūṇi kaṟiyamutu palām paḷam Uḷpaṭṭa
niṟṟakkaṭṭaḷaip paṭittaram ceṉṟa yitiruppaṇikkumāka nāyakkar Inta kiṟāmam caṟuvamāṉiyamāka śrī paṇṭā
rattile Aṉupavittuk koḷḷa kaṭavarākavum
Inta taṟmattai yātāmoruvar Akutam paṇ
Digital edition of SII 39.262 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
